overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a sterile, artificially-lit indoor corridor in an industrial or institutional facility, rendered in a game engine. The camera moves steadily forward through white-paneled hallways with green flooring, eventually reaching an intersection featuring a staircase and fire safety equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: sterile institutional corridor with safety signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the narrow corridor, passing closed doors and wall-mounted technical drawings

entered.detail: smooth white institutional wall panels lining both sides of the corridor
smooth green industrial flooring extending down the corridor length
recessed circular fluorescent ceiling lights spaced evenly overhead
white institutional doors with metal handles spaced along the corridor walls
large white technical blueprint poster mounted on the right wall
red fire safety sign with white cross symbol visible at the corridor end

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk down a long, sterile institutional corridor with white paneled walls and green flooring. Circular ceiling lights illuminate the path as the camera passes several closed doors and a technical drawing poster, approaching a red fire safety sign at the far end.

events.description: turns left at the corridor end into an intersection area revealing a staircase and fire safety equipment
turns right through a doorway to enter an adjacent corridor section

agents.ego_description: navigating the corridor intersection by turning left to approach the staircase, then turning right through a doorway into a connecting corridor

entered.detail: white metal staircase with green and red marked steps leading upward to the left
long rectangular fluorescent light fixture mounted on the ceiling above the intersection
white door with vertical glass window panel situated near the staircase
narrow corridor extension visible through the doorway on the right

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left at the corridor end into an intersection featuring a white metal staircase and a prominent fire extinguisher cabinet. After briefly showing the stairwell and a long fluorescent light fixture, the camera turns right through a doorway, entering a connecting corridor section while leaving the main corridor behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sterile institutional facility, moving from a long, linear corridor into a complex intersection of hallways. It begins by gliding down a white-paneled hallway with green flooring, passing closed doors and a technical drawing under the glow of circular ceiling lights. As the camera approaches a red fire safety sign, the path opens into an intersection where the view shifts to encompass a white metal staircase and a prominent fire extinguisher cabinet. The scene then pivots away from the stairwell and a long fluorescent light fixture, turning right through a doorway to enter a connecting corridor section.
